raw:
PRIORITY FEATURES - Concord

- The mobile ui needs work. Its impossible to log out, the pages dont scroll, text doesnt format properly. and more. THis menu feels cheap and terrible on mobile and that needs to change.

- I want rich text display in all chat rooms. Seeing my ai agent desperately stuff formatting into their response only for it to be ignored is pretty rough.

- When I type more than can fit on one line the text input box needs to grow to accomodate that text. That measn that the chat display moves up dynamically as well.
optimized:
### OPT-001: Fix mobile UI usability
Overhaul Concord mobile UI. Required fixes: (1) make logout accessible from mobile menu, (2) enable scrolling on all pages, (3) fix text formatting/wrapping, (4) audit and replace cheap-feeling mobile menu styling. Acceptance: user can log out, scroll, and read formatted text on mobile without layout breaks.

Source: "The mobile ui needs work. Its impossible to log out, the pages dont scroll, text doesnt format properly... menu feels cheap and terrible on mobile"

### OPT-002: Render rich text in chat rooms
Implement rich text rendering in all Concord chat room message displays. Support standard markdown formatting (bold, italic, code blocks, lists, links, headings) emitted by AI agents and users. Acceptance: messages containing markdown render as formatted text, not raw characters.

Source: "I want rich text display in all chat rooms. Seeing my ai agent desperately stuff formatting into their response only for it to be ignored"

### OPT-003: Auto-grow chat input box
Make the chat message input box dynamically expand vertically as the user types beyond one line. The chat message display above must shift up correspondingly so the newest messages remain visible. Acceptance: typing multi-line input grows the input area and pushes chat history upward in real time.

Source: "When I type more than can fit on one line the text input box needs to grow to accomodate that text. That means that the chat display moves up dynamically as well."
